title: BoardAppointment
description: A person the Brooklyn Borough President has appointed to (or designated as a representative on) a board, council, or advisory body — the office's appointment power. One canonical schema reconciling the many parallel 'BP Appointments' Open Data datasets: Community Education Councils (5mxw-kxpt), HHC Community Advisory Boards (avh4-h5hx), Brooklyn Public Library Board (q7f5-jwds), DYCD Neighborhood Advisory Boards (95u9-kyyu), Business Improvement Districts (pvxf-9irb), Solid Waste Advisory Board (rbwa-m4iy), and Miscellaneous Boards (efdc-dxuz).

board.description: The board / council / body the person serves on (e.g. Community Education Council, HHC CAB, BPL Board, BID, SWAB).

boardType.description: Which appointments dataset / board family this record comes from.

title.description: Contact title where present ('TITLE/ Contact Persons').
